de: Frühwarnsystem schlägt Alarm: Mindestens zwei Tote bei Erdbeben in Mexiko. In Mexiko treffen mehrere Erdplatten aufeinander, was die Gegend anfällig für Erdstöße macht. Bei einem Beben der Stärke 6,5 sterben zwei Menschen. Das Epizentrum liegt rund 400 Kilometer von der Hauptstadt entfernt.
en: Early warning system sounds the alarm: at least two dead in earthquake in Mexico. In Mexico, several tectonic plates meet, making the area vulnerable to tremors. Two people die in a magnitude 6.5 earthquake. The epicenter is around 400 kilometers from the capital.
la: Systema praenuntia terrorem sonat: saltem duos mortuos in terrae motu in Mexico. In Mexico multae laminae tectonicae conveniant, aream tremoribus vulnerabilem facientibus. Duo homines in magnitudine 6.5 terrae motus moriuntur. Epicenter circiter 400 chiliometrorum capitalium est.

en: President Sheinbaum interrupts press conference: 6.5 magnitude earthquake shakes southern Mexico - one fatality. The electricity goes out, gas pipes are damaged, and the President has to interrupt her press conference. But things are largely unscathed: no major damage is initially reported.
la: Praeses Sheinbaum colloquium diurnariis interpellat: 6.5 magnitudo terrae motus Mexico meridionalem - una fatum quatit. Electricitas exit, fistulae gasi laeduntur, et Praeses colloquium diurnariis interrumpere habet. Sed res magnae incolumes sunt: ​​nulla maior iniuria initio nuntiatur.

en: Strong earthquake shakes Mexico - at least one dead. A severe earthquake struck Mexico on Friday. According to authorities, a 60-year-old died when he fell while evacuating his apartment. Twelve other people were injured. No major damage was reported.
la: Fortis terrae motus Mexicum commovet - saltem unum mortuum. Gravis terrae motus Mexicum die Veneris percussit. Secundum auctores, LX annos natus decessit cum e cubiculo emisso cecidit. Duodecim alii homines vulnerati sunt. Nullum maius damnum relatum est.

de: Schweres Erdbeben erschüttert Süden von Mexiko. Ein schweres Erdbeben der Stärke 6,5 hat Mexiko erschüttert. Mindestens zwei Menschen kamen ums Leben, zahlreiche Gebäude wurden evakuiert.
en: Severe earthquake shakes southern Mexico. A massive 6.5 magnitude earthquake shook Mexico. At least two people were killed and numerous buildings were evacuated.
la: Gravis terrae motus Mexico meridionalem quatit. Magna 6.5 magnitudo terrae motus Mexicanus concussit. Saltem duo homines interfecti sunt et multa aedificia vacua sunt.
